prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-BOATHAULER-YX5899-KPKO-FBA Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Friction Power Off Road Monster Toy Truck Speed Boat with Trailer Hitch, Red, Boys, Ages 3+ Description: The Trail Master Friction Power Monster Truck Speed Boat Hauler belongs in every child's room. Combining the fun of a 9" friction propelled monster truck, and the cool factor of a 10" speed boat, this toy is a can't miss christmas gift for boys >With awesome vehicle details and a durable construction, the Trail Master Friction Monster Truck Speed Boat Hauler is sure to be your child's new favorite toy.

Great for ages 3+ Search Terms: toys for boy big wheelers speed boat trailer hitch indoor play outdoor play pretend play holiday toy list 2022 christmas gift gifts stocking stuffer learning and educational toys toy truck Features: - FRICTION POWERED BOAT HAULER - Cool toy truck hauler makes a great gift for young boys and monster truck fanatics! It's powered by friction, so there's no need for batteries! Endless toy truck fun for kids - HIGH-QUALITY TOY CONSTRUCTION - Large diecast truck measures 9" x 6.5" x 6" | Speed boat measures 10" x 5.5" x 4" - PROMOTES CREATIVITY - Playing with toy vehicles and toy boats can teach children about the basics of mechanics and promotes creativity and imagination during pretend play | Ideal toy for indoor or outdoor play - MONSTER TRUCK THEME - Perfect toy for kids who love monster trucks, big wheelers, semi-trucks, and speed boats! 1:64 Scale, realistic and intricate details for the ultimate playtime experience - SAFE FOR KIDS - Built from high-quality diecast and plastic that is safe for children ages 3 and up | Kids can take their monster truck boat hauler with them to the park, the beach and on playdates === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
